A

allSunk() - Method in class Fleet
Returns true if every ship has been sunk
assignJson(int) - Static method in class Message
{"type":"ASSIGN","playerNumber":<n>}

B

BattleshipServer - Class in Unnamed Package
Entry point for the Networked Battleship server Accepts exactly two WebSocket connections on the configured port (default 8080), wires up all game objects and threads, then blocks until both ClientHandler threads finish.
BattleshipServer() - Constructor for class BattleshipServer
 
board - Variable in class ShipPlacementGenerator.ShipPlacements
 
Board - Class in Unnamed Package
One player's 10x10 Battleship grid Maintains hiddenBoard (actual ship layout, never revealed to the opponent) and playerView (opponent-visible hits and misses, also used to enforce already-targeted).
Board(char[][]) - Constructor for class Board
 
BOARD_SIZE - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 

C

chatJson(String, String) - Static method in class Message
{"type":"CHAT","from":"<from>","text":"<text>"}
ClientHandler - Class in Unnamed Package
Reader thread for one connected client Performs the WebSocket handshake, sends ASSIGN, then loops reading frames and forwarding each parsed Message to GameServer.handleMessage.
ClientHandler(Socket, int, GameServer) - Constructor for class ClientHandler
 
col - Variable in class Message
 

E

errorJson(String) - Static method in class Message
{"type":"ERROR","message":"<msg>"}

F

fireShot(int, int) - Method in class Board
Fires a shot at (row, col).
Fleet - Class in Unnamed Package
Tracks the damage status of one player's fleet Each ship is identified by its index in SHIP_NAMES.
Fleet(int[][], int[][]) - Constructor for class Fleet
 
fullStateToJson() - Method in class Board
Returns a JSON 2-D array encoding the full revealed state of this board.

G

GameConfiguration - Class in Unnamed Package
 
GameConfiguration() - Constructor for class GameConfiguration
 
gameOverJson(int, String) - Static method in class Message
{"type":"GAME_OVER","winner":<n>,"finalBoard":<2d array>}
GameServer - Class in Unnamed Package
Authoritative game-state container and message dispatcher Called concurrently by two ClientHandler threads; all shared state (boards, fleets, turn, phase, readyCount) is protected by synchronized(this).
GameServer(Socket, Socket, WriterThread, WriterThread) - Constructor for class GameServer
 
gameStartJson(String, int) - Static method in class Message
{"type":"GAME_START","myBoard":<2d array>,"turn":<n>}
generatePlacements(Scanner, boolean) - Method in class ShipPlacementGenerator
Returns a 2D board array with ships placed on it.
getInstance() - Static method in class ShipPlacementGenerator
 
getName(int) - Method in class Fleet
 
getPlayerViewCell(int, int) - Method in class Board
Returns the opponent-visible state of a single cell (WATER, HIT, or MISS)
getShipCount() - Method in class Fleet
Returns the total number of ships
getShipsAfloat() - Method in class Fleet
Returns the number of ships not yet fully hit
getSize() - Method in class Board
Returns the side length of this board
getSize(int) - Method in class Fleet
 

H

handleDisconnect(int) - Method in class GameServer
Called when a client disconnects or throws an IOException.
handleMessage(int, Message) - Method in class GameServer
Processes one message from the given player.
handshake(InputStream, OutputStream) - Static method in class WebSocketUtil
Performs the WebSocket HTTP upgrade handshake.
HIT - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 

I

isSunk(int) - Method in class Fleet
 
isTargeted(int, int) - Method in class Board
Returns true if the cell at (row, col) has already been fired upon.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class BattleshipServer
 
MAX_SHOTS - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 
Message - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a single protocol message between server and client All messages share a type field; additional fields depend on the type.
Message() - Constructor for class Message
 
MISS - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 

N

name - Variable in class Message
 

O

opponentDisconnectedJson() - Static method in class Message
{"type":"OPPONENT_DISCONNECTED"}

P

parse(String) - Static method in class Message
Parses a JSON string received from a client into a Message.
POISON_PILL - Static variable in class WriterThread
Sentinel value that causes this thread to flush remaining messages and exit

R

readFrame(InputStream) - Static method in class WebSocketUtil
Reads one WebSocket text frame from in.
registerHit(int, int) - Method in class Fleet
Registers a hit at (row, col).
row - Variable in class Message
 
run() - Method in class ClientHandler
Handshake then ASSIGN then read loop; calls handleDisconnect on exit
run() - Method in class WriterThread
Blocks on outbox.take, writes each string as a WebSocket frame, exits on POISON_PILL or IOException

S

send(String) - Method in class WriterThread
Enqueues a JSON string for delivery to this client.
sendAssign(int) - Method in class GameServer
Sends ASSIGN (and WAITING for player 1) to the given player.
SHIP - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 
SHIP_NAMES - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 
SHIP_SIZES - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 
shipCols - Variable in class ShipPlacementGenerator.ShipPlacements
 
shipLayoutToJson() - Method in class Board
Returns a JSON 2-D array representing where this player's ships are placed.
ShipPlacementGenerator - Class in Unnamed Package
Generates ship placements for the Battleship game.
ShipPlacementGenerator.ShipPlacements - Class in Unnamed Package
Container for ship placement results.
ShipPlacements(char[][], int[][], int[][]) - Constructor for class ShipPlacementGenerator.ShipPlacements
 
shipRows - Variable in class ShipPlacementGenerator.ShipPlacements
 
shotResultJson(int, int, int, boolean, String) - Static method in class Message
{"type":"SHOT_RESULT","shooter":<n>,"row":<r>,"col":<c>,"hit":<bool>,"sunkShip":<name|null>}
shutdown() - Method in class WriterThread
Signals this thread to stop after delivering any already-queued messages.

T

text - Variable in class Message
 
turnChangeJson(int) - Static method in class Message
{"type":"TURN_CHANGE","turn":<n>}
type - Variable in class Message
 

W

waitingJson() - Static method in class Message
{"type":"WAITING"}
WATER - Static variable in class GameConfiguration
 
WebSocketUtil - Class in Unnamed Package
 
WebSocketUtil() - Constructor for class WebSocketUtil
 
writeFrame(OutputStream, String) - Static method in class WebSocketUtil
Writes a WebSocket text frame containing message to out.
WriterThread - Class in Unnamed Package
Dedicated writer thread for one connected client Drains a LinkedBlockingQueue of JSON strings and writes each as a WebSocket frame.
WriterThread(LinkedBlockingQueue<String>, OutputStream, Socket) - Constructor for class WriterThread
